skills.name: taste-skill
skills.description: The main design skill for premium frontend code. Covers layout, typography, colors, spacing, and motion.

skills.name: gpt-taste
skills.description: Elite Awwwards-level frontend design and GSAP motion skill for premium, deterministic, anti-slop UI generation.

skills.name: image-to-code-skill
skills.description: Image-first frontend skill for generating premium website references, deeply analyzing them, and implementing code to match.

skills.name: imagegen-frontend-web
skills.description: Image-generation-only skill for creating premium website design reference images. Does not write code.

skills.name: imagegen-frontend-mobile
skills.description: Image-generation-only skill for creating premium mobile app screen concepts and flows. Does not write code.

skills.name: brandkit
skills.description: Image-generation-only skill for creating premium brand-kit overview images with logo concepts, identity systems, color palettes, typography, and mockups. Does not write code.

skills.name: redesign-skill
skills.description: For upgrading existing projects by auditing and fixing design problems.

skills.name: soft-skill
skills.description: Focuses on an expensive, soft UI look with premium fonts, whitespace, depth, and smooth animations.

skills.name: output-skill
skills.description: Prevents AI from being lazy, skipping code blocks, or using placeholder comments.

skills.name: minimalist-skill
skills.description: Enforces clean, editorial-style interfaces (Notion/Linear style) with strict monochrome palettes.

skills.name: brutalist-skill
skills.description: Raw mechanical interfaces, Swiss typography, extreme scale contrast. (Beta)

skills.name: stitch-skill
skills.description: Google Stitch-compatible semantic design rules for premium AI UI generation.
